# GNN Example: PyMDP Scaling N8 T50
# GNN Version: 1.0

## GNNSection
ActInfPOMDP

## GNNVersionAndFlags
GNN v1

## ModelName
PyMDP Scaling N8 T50

## ModelAnnotation
PyMDP runtime scaling sweep with noisy observation and stochastic transitions.

## StateSpaceBlock
s[8,1,type=float]
o[8,1,type=int]
A[8,8,type=float]
B[8,8,8,type=float]
C[8,type=float]
D[8,type=float]
pi[8,type=float]
u[1,type=int]
G[pi,type=float]
F[1,type=float]
t[1,type=int]

## Connections
D>s
s-A
A-o
s-B
C>G
G>pi
pi>u
B>u
s-F
o-F

# Standard Active Inference update equations

## Time
Time=t
Dynamic
Discrete
ModelTimeHorizon=50

A=LikelihoodMatrix
B=TransitionMatrix

s=HiddenState
o=Observation
pi=PolicyVector
u=Action
t=Time

num_obs: 8
